name: Microsoft Surface Laptop 7 (15")
shortDescription: The Microsoft Surface Laptop 7 15" brings the 45 TOPS Snapdragon X Elite NPU to a 15" PixelSense 120Hz touch display with 1TB storage — best large-screen Copilot+ PC for AI workflows.
useCases: Large-screen AI development and model testing
Running multiple AI tools side-by-side on a 15" workspace
On-device LLM inference with Copilot+ Windows features
AI-assisted content creation on a larger canvas
Developer workstation with 1TB local storage for model experimentation
pros: 15" PixelSense 120Hz touch — best screen size for AI workflow monitoring and multi-window development
1TB storage included — more room for downloaded models and datasets
Same 45 TOPS NPU as 13" — full Copilot+ feature parity on a bigger screen
Snapdragon X Elite 12-core for improved multi-threaded CPU inference
Outstanding battery life for a 15" machine — 18–20 hours
cons: Same 16GB RAM ceiling as the 13" — limits model size similarly
Larger and heavier than 13" — less portable
$200 more than the 13" primarily for screen size and storage
verdict: The Surface Laptop 7 15" is the right choice if you want more screen real estate for AI workflows without changing the core platform. Same NPU, same software ecosystem, same battery life — just a larger display and 2× the storage. The $200 premium over the 13" is justified if you use the laptop as a primary workstation rather than a travel machine.

faq.question: Is the 15" Surface Laptop 7 faster than the 13" for AI tasks?
faq.answer: Slightly. The 15" uses the Snapdragon X Elite 12-core variant (vs 10-core in some 13" configs), giving ~15% better CPU multi-thread performance for workloads that don't use the NPU. NPU performance at 45 TOPS is identical across both sizes. For pure AI inference, the difference is minor.

faq.question: Does the 1TB SSD make a difference for local AI?
faq.answer: Yes, practically. Each 7B Q4 model is about 4GB; a 13B Q4 model is 8GB. With 1TB, you can keep 100+ models locally without managing disk space. The 512GB 13" version fills up quickly once you start downloading SDXL weights, Whisper models, and multiple LLM variants.

notFor: Frequent travelers — heavier and larger than the 13" variant
Users who need more than 16GB RAM — neither Surface Laptop 7 variant goes higher
entityHeadline: Surface Laptop 7 15" Review: Best Large-Screen Copilot+ PC for On-Device AI Workflows
